name: Marble Bath Tray Black - Threshold™: Resin Vanity Accessory, Spot Clean, 9.49" Depth
description:
Flaunt a modern bath space with the Marble Bath Tray from Threshold™. This black bath tray is designed in a rectangle shape with rounded corners and raised sides, and features a touch of speckled white hues for an appealing look. Place this marble tray on the counter to keep everything in one spot and add a coordinating marble soap dispenser and soap dish to complete the look of your bath space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
